texto: One often has to do what they have to do in order to do what they want to do
autor: however if you only do what you want to do then you will never do what you have to do!
explicacao: Orientação direta de however if you only do what you want to do then you will never do what you have to do! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “One often has to do what they have to do in order to do what they want to do” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, c-moorer, often, útil em momentos de reflexao.
